title: Georgia Polly Taylor Very Hot Very Messy
description: 'GEORGIA POLLY-TAYLOR: VERY HOT. VERY MESSY.' takes you on a grungy gondola trip through the kaleidoscopic sewers of celebrity. Fresh off the runways of Camden Fringe 2025, Rosebuds Comedy Festival 2025 and Boomtown Fair 2024, we find wannabe socialite-model ‘Hot Mess’ at her first ever MET Gala. Poses are struck, bowels are loose and dreams are crushed faster than you can say nepotism. After a VERY public embarrassment on what was meant to be the night of her dreams, Hot Mess goes on a journey through the drains of shame and self-discovery to find her place in the world. Part absurd clown, part catwalk diva: Georgia Polly-Taylor’s remarkably eccentric character celebrates the often disastrous reality of being human.

venue.name: Komedia Studio
venue.address: 44-47 Gardner Street, 44-46 Gardner Street, East Sussex
